summary: Iteration_7 verifies the new Reject Pending Address Change feature. BACKEND: 8/8 pytest passed in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_7_reject_address.py covering happy path with reason, 404 (no pending), 403 (non-admin), empty-reason fallback to 'No reason provided', missing-reason-body fallback, plus regression that approve-address-change + pending-list + request-address-change validation are unaffected. MongoDB verified directly: rejection clears pending_address_change, leaves btc_wallet_address untouched, and stores last_address_change_rejection {new_address, reason, rejected_at}. FRONTEND (mobile 390x844 live preview): admin login -> 'Pending Address Changes (1)' rendered with Test User row showing BOTH green Approve and red Reject buttons. Tapping Reject opened modal titled 'Reject Address Change' with: email subtitle, 'Requested: <new_address>' line, multiline textarea placeholder 'Reason for rejection (optional)', and Cancel/Reject buttons. Submitting with reason 'UI test: suspicious address' produced the '✅ Rejected - Address change for koalatest@example.com was rejected' alert; dismissing OK -> list refreshed to 'Pending Address Changes (0)' with 'No pending address changes' and the row disappeared. DB inspection confirmed the reason text was persisted exactly as typed in the UI.

issues: Layout note (carryover-style): on a 390px viewport the row is tight - the Approve + Reject buttons sit next to a left info block and on narrow screens may push the long bc1q... address into truncation. Currently fine because info block has flex grow and addresses use ellipsizeMode='middle'. No action required, just flagging.

react_native_issues.issue: Carryover from iter_6 - console emits 'shadow*' deprecated (use boxShadow), 'textShadow*' deprecated (use textShadow). Non-blocking. Reference: /app/frontend/app/premium-mining-app.tsx (multiple lines).

Carryover - NEW Reject Address Change modal (reason textarea, Cancel/Reject buttons in modal) and the per-row Reject button have NO testID. All UI testing relied on text selectors. Recommend adding testID like 'admin-reject-addr-btn-<userId>', 'admin-reject-addr-modal-reason', 'admin-reject-addr-modal-submit', 'admin-reject-addr-modal-cancel'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/premium-mining-app.tsx:405-433, 628-667.

action_items: Optional: add testID to the new Reject button (per row) and Reject-modal elements (reason textarea, Cancel, Reject) for future automated testing.
Carryover: split premium-mining-app.tsx (now ~5362 lines) into per-screen modules.
Carryover: address RN-Web shadow*/textShadow* deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py reject_address_change (~line 4321): correctly enforces admin via is_admin(); correctly $unsets pending_address_change; correctly stores last_address_change_rejection with rejected_at timestamp; reason defaults to 'No reason provided' when empty/missing; uses except HTTPException: raise before generic Exception handler so 403/404 are not swallowed (carryover fix from iter_6 pattern). LGTM.

premium-mining-app.tsx confirmRejectAddressChange (line 183-204): correctly attaches Authorization header, sends JSON body { reason }, refreshes pendingAddressChanges + allUsers on success, surfaces backend detail on failure, and resets modal state. LGTM.

premium-mining-app.tsx Reject button onPress (line 426-433): opens modal with correct payload {userId, userEmail, newAddress, reason:''}. Uses gradient red #E53935 -> #C62828, consistent with the modal Reject CTA color. LGTM.

Note: the data Dict parameter on POST /api/admin/reject-address-change uses `data: Dict = None` then `(data or {}).get('reason', '')` - this handles both missing body and empty body correctly (verified by test_reject_with_empty_reason and test_reject_with_missing_reason_body). FastAPI happily accepts an empty {} body for Dict=None signature.
Carryover: premium-mining-app.tsx ZERO testID props; >5300 lines; should be code-split.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the new Reject flow: row shows Approve + Reject; modal opens with title/subtitle/requested-address/multiline reason/Cancel+Reject; submission shows ✅ Rejected; row disappears; pending count drops to 0; DB stores last_address_change_rejection.reason exactly as typed.

seed_data_creation: Seeded one pending_address_change as koalatest@example.com via POST /api/wallet/request-address-change with new_address bc1quitestrejectaddress11111111111111 so the admin UI had a row to Reject. After UI rejected it, DB shows last_address_change_rejection {new_address: 'bc1quitestrejectaddress11111111111111', reason: 'UI test: suspicious address', rejected_at: 2026-06-25T12:52:45Z} and btc_wallet_address remained bc1qexampleaddressxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx (unchanged). Pending list is empty after the run, so repeatable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_7 reject-address-change feature is fully verified end-to-end (backend 8/8 + UI flow + DB inspection). The test user starts and ends the iteration with btc_wallet_address bc1qexampleaddressxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx, balance 0.005 BTC, wallet_status='connected', no pending change. /app/memory/test_credentials.md still holds the canonical admin and user creds. No new server bugs found. NO testID was added by the developer for the new Reject UI; future testing should use text-based selectors ('Reject', 'Reject Address Change', 'Reason for rejection') or ask main agent to add testIDs. The 'Success! Welcome back' login alert still needs to be OK-dismissed before admin UI is interactive (carryover).
